provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, teenage human male maybe fifteen or sixteen with hollow cheeks and feral alertness, wearing clothes that are clearly scavenged from larger people — a thermal shirt hanging past his hands with the sleeves crudely cut, rope-belted trousers bunched at the waist, one boot and one wrapped-foot, a small knife hidden in the rope belt, no brand no faction he belongs to no one, he lives in the spaces between the docking clamps and steals to eat
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
